summary: Successful sessions still do not emit summary.json or trim to the design's retained artifact set, so the packet-12 History flow is built on an accidental dependency on untrimmed live task/session trees.
notes: Trackers were updated to insert repair packet 12A immediately after packet 12, packet 13 was updated to depend on that repair, and audits/drift_audit_state.json was advanced to make the next drift audit due after a validated 12A.
